subjects.description: A large overhead billboard structure spanning across and above the multi-lane highway, displaying a banking advertisement on the left side and a prominent red octagonal 'Stop Sign' graphic on the right side.
subjects.appearance_details: Wide rectangular gantry-mounted billboard with a clean white/blue background, glossy printed surface, sturdy steel support pillars on either side of the road; the stop sign graphic is bold red with white border and white 'STOP' lettering.
subjects.relationship: The main visual obstacle and focal point the ego vehicle is approaching and reacting to.
subjects.location: center, spanning the upper portion of the frame above the road
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera directly, perpendicular to the direction of travel
subjects.pose: Static, fixed structure mounted across the highway
subjects.action: Standing fixed across the road, growing larger as the vehicle approaches
subjects.state_changes: Appears small in the distance at first, then grows progressively larger and dominant in the frame as the ego vehicle approaches and stops.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, a passenger car, seen from the driver's first-person perspective with the dashboard and hood partially visible in the lower frame.
subjects.appearance_details: Dark dashboard, slight reflection on the windshield, hood edge visible at bottom of frame; modern sedan interior framing.
subjects.relationship: The viewpoint from which the entire scene is observed; the vehicle reacting to the billboard.
subjects.location: foreground, implied by the ego camera position
subjects.pose: Traveling forward along the lane, then decelerating to a complete stop
subjects.action: Driving on the highway then braking to a full stop near the billboard
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from steady highway speed to gradual deceleration and finally a complete stationary halt.

background_setting: A wide multi-lane expressway on the edge of a dense downtown at night under light rain, the wet black asphalt mirroring red tail-lights, white headlights and the glow of neon and streetlights. Lane markings gleam wet; guardrails and sparse roadside signs recede into the dark. The large overhead gantry billboard spans the road ahead on steel pillars, its illuminated face bright against the rainy night. Light traffic, spray hanging in the air.

lighting.conditions: Night, light rain, artificial city lighting
lighting.direction: No sun; overhead streetlights and the billboard's own internal illumination light the scene from above and ahead
lighting.shadows: No cast sun shadows; pooled reflections and specular streaks on the wet asphalt beneath the gantry and vehicles
lighting.illumination_effect: Low ambient light lifted by streetlights and the lit billboard; wet-road specular highlights and colored neon reflections, faint glare of oncoming headlights through the rain-flecked windshield

aesthetics.composition: Centered one-point perspective, the wet expressway converging toward the lit billboard at the vanishing point; dashboard anchors the lower frame, dark rainy sky above
aesthetics.color_scheme: Deep blacks of wet asphalt and night sky, cut by warm streetlight amber, neon color reflections, the striking red of the STOP graphic and blue-white of the bank ad
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating wet-gleaming lane dividers and reflected light streaks receding toward the horizon

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from ego vehicle perspective, decelerating to static
cinematography.depth_of_field: Deep, with soft rain-blur at the edges
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the lit billboard and rain-wet road ahead, headlights flaring softly

context: Automotive perception / advertising scenario demonstrating an ego vehicle responding to a stop sign displayed on an overhead billboard

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels at steady speed along the wet night expressway, the illuminated overhead billboard glowing small in the rainy distance ahead.

The billboard grows and its lit face resolves; the bank advertisement on the left and the prominent red STOP graphic on the right become clearly legible against the dark as the vehicle brakes and decelerates over a long, smooth stop, coming to a complete halt directly before the billboard by the end of this segment.
The vehicle remains fully stopped beneath the glowing billboard, rain streaking the windshield and reflections shimmering on the wet asphalt, for the final two seconds.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white uppercase lettering centered on a red octagonal sign with a white border
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Right portion of the overhead billboard, visible throughout, increasingly prominent as the vehicle approaches
text_and_signage_elements.context: A stop sign graphic prompting the vehicle to halt

text_and_signage_elements.text: SECURE BANK — Your Future, Our Promise
text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Blue and white corporate font with a small shield-style bank logo, clean sans-serif text
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Left portion of the overhead billboard, visible throughout the clip
text_and_signage_elements.context: Banking advertisement occupying the left side of the billboard

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises on the wet night expressway with the lit billboard small in the rainy distance ahead.
segments.key_changes: Billboard begins to grow in size; steady forward motion

segments.description: Billboard becomes large and legible against the dark; illuminated bank ad on left and red STOP on right are clearly visible as the vehicle brakes and decelerates over a long, smooth stop, reaching a full stop before the billboard by 0:06.
segments.key_changes: Progressive deceleration over four seconds; vehicle slows continuously and reaches a full stop by 0:06; billboard graphics become sharp
segments.camera: Forward tracking decelerating steadily to static

segments.description: Vehicle remains fully stationary beneath the glowing billboard, reflections shimmering on the wet road, for the final two seconds.
segments.key_changes: No motion; scene is held static

temporal_caption: At second 0, the ego car drives forward along a wet multi-lane expressway at night in light rain, the illuminated overhead billboard small and glowing near the horizon amid streetlights and neon reflections. By second 2 the billboard grows and its lit layout resolves. Between seconds 2 and 6 the bank advertisement on the left and the prominent red STOP graphic on the right become fully legible against the dark while the car brakes and decelerates over a long, smooth stop, coming to a complete halt directly before the billboard by second 6. From second 6 onward the vehicle remains fully stopped through seconds 7 and 8, rain streaking the glass and light shimmering on the wet asphalt.
audio_description: Wet tire hiss on rain-soaked asphalt and the patter of light rain dominate at speed, with faint city hum and distant traffic. The tire hiss and engine note fade as the brakes engage with a soft whir during deceleration. In the final segment the audio settles to a quiet idle with steady rain patter and the tick of the wipers. No speech or music.
